chunks.title: Personal Thanksgiving and Praise
chunks.reason: The psalmist declares personal commitment to thank God with all his heart and recounts a specific instance of divine answer.

chunks.title: Universal Praise and Divine Justice
chunks.reason: The focus shifts to a prophetic vision of all kings praising God and an explanation of His character regarding the high and lowly.

chunks.title: Trust in Distress and Final Petition
chunks.reason: The psalmist returns to personal experience of God's protection in distress and concludes with a prayer for the completion of His work.
